Update location

Update an existing location.

PUT and PATCH are equivalent here - both apply a partial update, changing only the fields present in the request body.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
id
required
integer

Location ID

query Parameters
access_key
required
string

API access key

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
string

Name of the location

description
string

Description of the location

parent_id
integer

ID of the parent location (for hierarchical structure)

position
integer

Position/order of the location

property name*
additional property
any

Responses

/api/v2/locations/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
  • cURL
  • Python
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "My precious location",
  • "description": "Updated location description",
  • "parent_id": 2
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1,
  • "name": "Main Office",
  • "description": "My very own location",
  • "parent_id": null,
  • "position": 0
}

Destroy location

Delete a location by ID. On success the deleted location's JSON is returned (HTTP 200).

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
id
required
integer

Location ID

query Parameters
access_key
required
string

API access key

Responses

/api/v2/locations/{id}

Request samples

  • cURL
  • Python
curl https://app.mojohelpdesk.com/api/v2/locations/1?access_key=<YOUR_API_KEY> -X DELETE

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1,
  • "name": "Main Office",
  • "description": "My very own location",
  • "parent_id": null,
  • "position": 0
}

Access Rights

List access rights for all agents

Retrieve every active agent in the account together with their ticket queue access rights. The list includes all agents (both those restricted to specific queues and those with access to all queues), not only restricted ones. Requires a Manager-level access key.

Authorizations:
AccessKey

Responses

/api/v2/access_rights/agents

Request samples

  • curl
  • Python
curl https://app.mojohelpdesk.com/api/v2/access_rights/agents?access_key=<YOUR_API_KEY>

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 1819458,
    • "name": "John Doe",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "full_name": "John Doe",
    • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
    • "accessible_queues": [
      • {
        • "id": 94748,
        • "name": "Support Queue"
        }
      ],
    • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
    • "picture_type": "url",
    • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
    }
]

List access rights for groups

Retrieve a list of all groups and their access rights to ticket queues. This endpoint shows which groups have access to which queues.

Authorizations:
AccessKey

Responses

/api/v2/access_rights/groups

Request samples

  • curl
  • Python
curl https://app.mojohelpdesk.com/api/v2/access_rights/groups?access_key=<YOUR_API_KEY>

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 1819458,
    • "name": "John Doe",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "full_name": "John Doe",
    • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
    • "accessible_queues": [
      • {
        • "id": 94748,
        • "name": "Support Queue"
        }
      ],
    • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
    • "picture_type": "url",
    • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
    }
]

Show access rights for a restricted agent

Retrieve the access rights for a specific restricted agent. Shows which ticket queues the agent has access to.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
user_id
required
integer

ID of the restricted agent

Responses

/api/v2/users/{user_id}/access_rights

Request samples

  • curl
  • Python
curl https://app.mojohelpdesk.com/api/v2/users/1819458/access_rights?access_key=<YOUR_API_KEY>

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1819458,
  • "name": "John Doe",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "full_name": "John Doe",
  • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
  • "accessible_queues": [
    • {
      • "id": 94748,
      • "name": "Support Queue"
      }
    ],
  • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  • "picture_type": "url",
  • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
}

Set access right for a restricted agent on a single queue

Set the access right for a restricted agent on a specific ticket queue. This allows or denies the agent access to tickets in that queue.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
user_id
required
integer

ID of the restricted agent

Request Body schema: application/json
required
ticket_queue_id
required
string

ID of the ticket queue

has_access
required
string
Enum: "true" "false"

Whether the agent has access to this queue

Responses

/api/v2/users/{user_id}/access_rights

Request samples

  • Payload
  • curl
  • Python
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ticket_queue_id": "94748",
  • "has_access": "true"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1819458,
  • "name": "John Doe",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "full_name": "John Doe",
  • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
  • "accessible_queues": [
    • {
      • "id": 94748,
      • "name": "Support Queue"
      }
    ],
  • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  • "picture_type": "url",
  • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
}

Set access right for a restricted agent on multiple queues

Set access rights for a restricted agent on multiple ticket queues at once. This allows or denies the agent access to multiple queues in a single request.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
user_id
required
integer

ID of the restricted agent

Request Body schema: application/json
required
keys
required
Array of strings

Array of ticket queue IDs

has_access
required
string
Enum: "true" "false"

Whether the agent has access to these queues

Responses

/api/v2/users/{user_id}/access_rights/set

Request samples

  • Payload
  • curl
  • Python
Content type
application/json
{
  • "keys": [
    • "94748",
    • "15"
    ],
  • "has_access": "true"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 1819458,
    • "name": "John Doe",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "full_name": "John Doe",
    • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
    • "accessible_queues": [
      • {
        • "id": 94748,
        • "name": "Support Queue"
        }
      ],
    • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
    • "picture_type": "url",
    • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
    }
]

Show access rights for a group

Retrieve the access rights for a specific group. Shows which ticket queues the group has access to.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
group_id
required
integer

ID of the group

Responses

/api/v2/groups/{group_id}/access_rights

Request samples

  • curl
  • Python
curl https://app.mojohelpdesk.com/api/v2/groups/124147/access_rights?access_key=<YOUR_API_KEY>

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1819458,
  • "name": "John Doe",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "full_name": "John Doe",
  • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
  • "accessible_queues": [
    • {
      • "id": 94748,
      • "name": "Support Queue"
      }
    ],
  • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  • "picture_type": "url",
  • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
}

Set access right for a group

Set access rights for a group. This can be used to grant access to a single queue, multiple queues, or all queues depending on the parameters provided.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
group_id
required
integer

ID of the group

Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
ticket_queue_id
required
string

ID of the ticket queue

has_access
required
string
Enum: "true" "false"

Whether the group has access to this queue

Responses

/api/v2/groups/{group_id}/access_rights

Request samples

  • Payload
  • curl - Single queue
  • curl - All queues
  • Python
Content type
application/json
{
  • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": "true"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1819458,
  • "name": "John Doe",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "full_name": "John Doe",
  • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
  • "accessible_queues": [
    • {
      • "id": 94748,
      • "name": "Support Queue"
      }
    ],
  • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  • "picture_type": "url",
  • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
}

Set access right for a group on multiple queues

Set access rights for a group on multiple ticket queues at once. This allows or denies the group access to multiple queues in a single request.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
group_id
required
integer

ID of the group

Request Body schema: application/json
required
keys
required
Array of strings

Array of ticket queue IDs

has_access
required
string
Enum: "true" "false"

Whether the group has access to these queues

Responses

/api/v2/groups/{group_id}/access_rights/set

Request samples

  • Payload
  • curl
  • Python
Content type
application/json
{
  • "keys": [
    • "94748",
    • "15"
    ],
  • "has_access": "true"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 1819458,
    • "name": "John Doe",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "full_name": "John Doe",
    • "has_access_to_all_ticket_queues": false,
    • "accessible_queues": [
      • {
        • "id": 94748,
        • "name": "Support Queue"
        }
      ],
    • "picture_url": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
    • "picture_type": "url",
    • "picture_color": "#3366cc"
    }
]

Articles

Search knowledge base articles

Search knowledge base articles visible to the caller. Available to any logged-in user (no Manager role required). Returns a lightweight list of matching articles with only id and title.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
query Parameters
query
string

Search terms (truncated to 256 characters). When omitted or blank, all visible articles are returned.

sort_field
string

Field to sort results by.

sort_order
string
Enum: "asc" "desc"

Sort direction.

page
integer
Default: 1

Page number for pagination.

per_page
integer

Results per page.

Responses

/api/v2/articles/search

Request samples

  • curl
  • Python
curl -G 'https://app.mojohelpdesk.com/api/v2/articles/search' \
  --data-urlencode 'access_key=<YOUR_API_KEY>' \
  --data-urlencode 'query=password reset'

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "title": "string"
    }
]

Create knowledge base article

Create a new knowledge base article. Requires manager-level access. The account must be subscribed to a plan that supports the knowledge base.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
title
required
string

Title of the article (1-255 characters)

description
string

Body of the article (HTML allowed)

keywords
string

Comma-separated search keywords (max 255 characters)

status
integer
Enum: 1 99

Publication status. Defaults to Published (99) when omitted.

  • 1 - Unpublished (draft)
  • 99 - Published
is_featured
boolean

Whether the article is featured on the knowledge base home

is_useful
integer

Count of "this was useful" votes for the article. Write-permitted by the API, though normally maintained by end-user feedback.

is_not_useful
integer

Count of "this was not useful" votes for the article. Write-permitted by the API, though normally maintained by end-user feedback.

staff_only
boolean

Whether the article is restricted to staff (agents/managers)

topic_ids
Array of integers

IDs of the knowledge base topics (categories) the article belongs to. Pass an empty array to leave the article uncategorized.

property name*
additional property
any

Responses

/api/v2/articles

Request samples

  • Payload
  • curl
  • Python
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "How to Reset Your Password",
  • "description": "<p>Follow these steps to reset your password...</p>",
  • "keywords": "password, reset, login",
  • "status": 99,
  • "is_featured": true,
  • "staff_only": false,
  • "topic_ids": [
    • 3,
    • 7
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1,
  • "title": "How to Reset Your Password",
  • "description": "<p>Follow these steps to reset your password...</p>",
  • "keywords": "password, reset, login",
  • "status": 99,
  • "is_featured": false,
  • "is_useful": 12,
  • "is_not_useful": 1,
  • "staff_only": false,
  • "views": 345,
  • "author_email": "manager@example.com",
  • "published_on": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "created_on": "2024-01-10T09:00:00Z",
  • "updated_on": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "account_id": 42
}

Show knowledge base article

Retrieve details of a specific knowledge base article. Requires manager-level access.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
id
required
integer

ID of the article

Responses

/api/v2/articles/{id}

Request samples

  • curl
  • Python
curl https://app.mojohelpdesk.com/api/v2/articles/42?access_key=<YOUR_API_KEY>

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1,
  • "title": "How to Reset Your Password",
  • "description": "<p>Follow these steps to reset your password...</p>",
  • "keywords": "password, reset, login",
  • "status": 99,
  • "is_featured": false,
  • "is_useful": 12,
  • "is_not_useful": 1,
  • "staff_only": false,
  • "views": 345,
  • "author_email": "manager@example.com",
  • "published_on": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "created_on": "2024-01-10T09:00:00Z",
  • "updated_on": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "account_id": 42
}

Update knowledge base article

Update an existing knowledge base article. Requires manager-level access. Only fields included in the request body are modified.

PUT and PATCH are equivalent here - both apply a partial update, changing only the fields present in the request body.

Authorizations:
AccessKey
path Parameters
id
required
integer

ID of the article

Request Body schema: application/json
required
title
string

Title of the article (1-255 characters)

description
string

Body of the article (HTML allowed)

keywords
string

Comma-separated search keywords (max 255 characters)

status
integer
Enum: 1 99

Publication status:

  • 1 - Unpublished (draft)
  • 99 - Published
is_featured
boolean

Whether the article is featured on the knowledge base home

is_useful
integer

Count of "this was useful" votes for the article. Write-permitted by the API, though normally maintained by end-user feedback.

is_not_useful
integer

Count of "this was not useful" votes for the article. Write-permitted by the API, though normally maintained by end-user feedback.

staff_only
boolean

Whether the article is restricted to staff (agents/managers)

topic_ids
Array of integers

IDs of the knowledge base topics (categories) the article belongs to. When omitted, the article's existing topics are left untouched. Pass an empty array to clear the article's topics.

property name*
additional property
any

Responses

/api/v2/articles/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
  • curl
  • Python
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "How to Reset Your Password (updated)",
  • "is_featured": true,
  • "topic_ids": [
    • 3
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 1,
  • "title": "How to Reset Your Password",
  • "description": "<p>Follow these steps to reset your password...</p>",
  • "keywords": "password, reset, login",
  • "status": 99,
  • "is_featured": false,
  • "is_useful": 12,
  • "is_not_useful": 1,
  • "staff_only": false,
  • "views": 345,
  • "author_email": "manager@example.com",
  • "published_on": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "created_on": "2024-01-10T09:00:00Z",
  • "updated_on": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "account_id": 42
}
